items.detail: CTLD detected in mission scripts. checkHoverStatus and checkAIStatus poll every 1–2s over all registered transport pilots — a steady CPU cost at scale.

7,886 non-blank lines of mission-specific Lua (frameworks excluded): OpForAC.lua (6,091), Jtac_Zeus.lua (1,008), flight_message.lua (331), PlaygroundMenuNelis2.lua (188), arty_strike.lua (188), NellisGroundSpawns.lua (48), gm_bench.lua (32). Threshold: warning >5,000, critical >15,000.
